# terrible_cisco_mso_mso_schema_site_anp_epg_staticport (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `anp` (String) The name of the ANP.
- `epg` (String) The name of the EPG.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `schema` (String) The name of the schema.
- `site` (String) The name of the site.
- `template` (String) The name of the template.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `deployment_immediacy` (String) The deployment immediacy of the static port. `immediate` means **Deploy immediate**. `lazy` means **deploy on demand**.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `fex` (String) The fex id of the static port.
- `force_replace` (Boolean) Replaces all the configured static port(s) with the provided static port(s). This option can only be used in combination with the `static_ports` option. In combination with the `state=absent` and without any static port configuration all configured static port(s) will be removed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `leaf` (String) The leaf of the static port.
- `mode` (String) The mode of the static port. `native` means **Access (802.1p**). `regular` means **Trunk**. `untagged` means **Access (untagged**).
- `path` (String) The path of the static port.
- `pod` (String) The pod of the static port.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `primary_micro_segment_vlan` (Number) Primary micro-seg VLAN of static port.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Use `present` or `absent` for adding or removing. Use `query` for listing an object or multiple objects.
- `static_ports` (String) A list of Static Ports associated to this EPG. All configured Static Ports will be replaced with the provided Static Ports when used with `force_replace=true`. Only the provided Static Ports will be added, updated or removed when used with `force_replace=false`. In combination with the `state=query` all provided Static Ports must be found else the task will fail. When *static_ports* attributes are not provided the module attributes will be used. For each Static Ports provided in the list, the following attributes must be resolved *static_ports.type* *static_ports.pod* *static_ports.leaf* *static_ports.path* *static_ports.vlan*
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `type` (String) The path type of the static port `vpc` is used for a Virtual Port Channel `dpc` is used for a Direct Port Channel `port` is used for a single interface
- `vlan` (Number) The port encap VLAN id of the static port.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
